title: Creating item in low level board from column info in high level board
excerpt: I have deadlines in a High Level board.  When creating a low level board from my template, I would like to create a new item called Deadline in my new low level board AND add the connected deadline.

posts.author: elprush (Elena Rush)
posts.cookedHtml: I have deadlines in a High Level board. When creating a low level board from my template, I would like to create a new item called Deadline in my new low level board AND add the connected deadline.
